designBrief.silhouette: broad low chassis, obvious rotating turret, single main cannon
designBrief.palette: dark ceramic with yellow/gold emissive accents
designBrief.rtsReadabilityNotes: Must stay readable from an isometric RTS camera at distance; no noisy micro-detail that shimmers; faction accent visible but not overwhelming; no text.

promptCandidates: Stylized seamless sci-fi vehicle hull texture sheet for a yellow faction armored frontline combat vehicle in an alien RTS. Material: iridescent ceramic-alloy, energy lattice inlays. Palette: dark ceramic with yellow/gold emissive accents. Alien design language: gyroscopic, energy lattice, floating segments, solar-forged. Include armor panel lines, subtle wear, faction markings as abstract glyphs. Forbidden: crane arms, cargo hoppers, multiple long barrels. Must stay readable from an isometric RTS camera at distance; no noisy micro-detail that shimmers; faction accent visible but not overwhelming; no text.

A seamless, orthographic texture sheet for a heavy sci-fi combat vehicle hull, showcasing an iridescent ceramic-alloy with a dark, obsidian-like ceramic base. The surface features rugged, multi-layered armored plating and intricate alien industrial details, including strange pressure vents, complex hexagonal segments, and etched, non-sensical glyph-like patterns. Bright yellow and molten gold emissive accents glow from deep recessed channels and within delicate energy lattice inlays that crisscross the plating, suggesting internal power conduits. The texture must be perfectly flat, free of any perspective, baked lighting, or overlaying text, designed for tiling across a large surface.

Generate a seamless, flat orthographic texture sheet of an advanced sci-fi armored vehicle hull, free from perspective, baked lighting, or text. The material is a highly iridescent ceramic-alloy, primarily a deep, muted charcoal ceramic, exhibiting subtle shifts of color under light. The surface is densely packed with intricate alien industrial surface details: integrated modular plating with unknown energy conduits, delicate glowing filigree patterns that resemble organic circuitry, and segmented panels secured by robust, alien-designed fasteners. Vibrant yellow and luminous gold emissive accents, alongside complex energy lattice inlays, pulse and radiate from narrow seams and within the alien-tech embellishments, creating a dynamic contrast against the dark, lustrous hull.

notes: Gameplay stats are defined in src/data/unitClasses.ts and were not touched.
